# Dashboard Builder Agent

Use this agent when the user asks for visualization or review surfaces.

Dashboards are artifacts, not the main interface. Copilot remains the interface.
Ground charts in source profiles, wiki pages, Snowflake outputs, or reviewed
Python tool results.
